title: [RTL] Need support for declarations of module parameters
body:
Big task:

Right now rtl.instance supports a parameters list, but there are no declarations to check this against to make sure they line up.  Adding parameterization to the rtl dialect modules is a big job, but would be very useful.  It would make sense to start with extmodule before tackling module.  Even that is non-trival though because you have parametric types for inputs and outputs.
